name: climbing-send-attempt
description: Bouldering send/attempt: a V5 problem sent on the 2nd try of 3 attempts. Uses `outcome.attempts { made, attempted }` (§5.18) — the field the spec calls out by name for climbing send/attempt/flash — alongside a `success` outcome for the send itself; the grade is carried as an open `modifiers` token (the same mechanism as HYROX's `target_height`), not a new field.
